---
title: "get_title_details"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_title_details()`

Get Title Details

## Usage

```r
get_title_details(title_id, token = "FLIX_PATROL")
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `title_id` | Character. The FlixPatrol title ID (e.g., '"ttl_..."'). |
| `token` | Character. API environment variable name. |

## Value

A named list of title metadata.

## Description

Retrieves full metadata for a single title by its FlixPatrol ID, including
runtime, genre, release date, IMDB rating, and other details.
